challenge.title: Korak 40
challenge.description:
Pre nego što unesete vremenske oznake u sistem e-pošte, vežbajte korišćenje formatiranja datuma i vremena. Funkcija datetime.datetime.now() daje nam trenutni datum i vreme, a možete koristiti metodu strftime() da ih organizujete na različite načine.

Ovo je kako strftime() radi sa kodom strukture:

now = datetime.datetime.now()
print(now.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"))  # Output: 2024-03-15 (year-month-day with - separator)

Formatni kodovi poput %Y (godina), %m (mesec) i %d (dan) govore funkciji strftime() šta da uključi, a između njih možeš dodati razdvajače poput -.

Na samom dnu svog koda, kreiraj varijablu nazvanu current_time i postavi joj vrednost datetime.datetime.now(). Zatim koristi strftime() da odštampa vreme u formatu sat:minut:sekund koristeći : kao separator.

Koristite ove kodove strukture: %H za sate (format 24 sata), %M za minute, i %S za sekunde.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Treba da kreirate parametar nazvan current_time i postavite mu vrednost datetime.datetime.now().
Trebalo bi da koristiš strftime() za štampanje vremena u formatu %H:%M:%S.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import datetime

class Email:
    def __init__(self, sender, receiver, subject, body):
        self.sender = sender
        self.receiver = receiver
        self.subject = subject
        self.body = body
        self.timestamp = datetime.datetime.now()
        self.read = False

    def mark_as_read(self):
        self.read = True

    def display_full_email(self):
        self.mark_as_read()
        print('\n--- Email ---')
        print(f'From: {self.sender.name}')
        print(f'To: {self.receiver.name}')
        print(f'Subject: {self.subject}')
        print(f"Received: {self.timestamp.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}")
        print(f'Body: {self.body}')
        print('------------\n')

    def __str__(self):
        status = 'Read' if self.read else 'Unread'
        return f"[{status}] From: {self.sender.name} | Subject: {self.subject} | Time: {self.timestamp.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}"


class Inbox:
    def __init__(self):
        self.emails = []

    def receive_email(self, email):
        self.emails.append(email)

    def list_emails(self):
        if not self.emails:
            print('Your inbox is empty.\n')
            return
        print('\nYour Emails:')
        for i, email in enumerate(self.emails, start=1):
            print(f'{i}. {email}')

    def read_email(self, index):
        if not self.emails:
            print('Inbox is empty.\n')
            return
        actual_index = index - 1
        if actual_index < 0 or actual_index >= len(self.emails):
            print('Invalid email number.\n')
            return
        self.emails[actual_index].display_full_email()

    def delete_email(self, index):
        if not self.emails:
            print('Inbox is empty.\n')
            return
        actual_index = index - 1
        if actual_index < 0 or actual_index >= len(self.emails):
            print('Invalid email number.\n')
            return
        del self.emails[actual_index]
        print('Email deleted.\n')


class User:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
        self.inbox = Inbox()

    def send_email(self, receiver, subject, body):
        email = Email(sender=self, receiver=receiver, subject=subject, body=body)
        receiver.inbox.receive_email(email)
        print(f'Email sent from {self.name} to {receiver.name}!\n')

    def check_inbox(self):
        print(f"\n{self.name}'s Inbox:")
        self.inbox.list_emails()

    def read_email(self, index):
        self.inbox.read_email(index)

    def delete_email(self, index):
        self.inbox.delete_email(index)


def main():
    # Create users
    tory = User('Tory')
    ramy = User('Ramy')

    # Send emails
    tory.send_email(ramy, 'Hello', 'Hi Ramy, just saying hello!')
    ramy.send_email(tory, 'Re: Hello', 'Hi Tory, hope you are fine.')

    # Ramy checks inbox
    ramy.check_inbox()

    # Ramy reads first email (now uses 1-based indexing)
    ramy.read_email(1)

    # Ramy deletes first email (now uses 1-based indexing)
    ramy.delete_email(1)

    # Ramy checks inbox again
    ramy.check_inbox()


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
